commandsRun.observation: Captured live probe readbacks, tx receipts/events, canonical risk path, revive.accountInfoOf code hash, and healthy-vs-stressed quote comparison.

commandsRun.command: cd "/home/kpa/polkadot/dualvm" && node --input-type=module - <<'NODE' ...prints raw receipt logs for borrow tx 0x5a9edd08efd8aec5e1ccbe0295b97e03cebc1b75588acf19a2738a109deba532... NODE
commandsRun.observation: Showed the first borrow log came from RiskAdapter 0x67D0... and revealed my initial QuoteTicketPublished ABI assumption was wrong.

commandsRun.command: cd "/home/kpa/polkadot/dualvm" && node --input-type=module - <<'NODE' ...queries CallbackReceived and RoundTripSettled logs from public RPC... NODE
commandsRun.observation: Found two successful CallbackReceived logs (txs 0x103e27... and 0x054774...) and only two roundtrip settlement logs, both starting from principalDebt 2140/settlementCount 4 state.

commandsRun.command: cd "/home/kpa/polkadot/dualvm" && node --input-type=module - <<'NODE' ...first attempt to write pvm-live-history.json... NODE
commandsRun.observation: Failed locally because parseAbiItem output was incorrectly treated as having a decode() method; no report artifact was used from this attempt.

commandsRun.command: cd "/home/kpa/polkadot/dualvm" && node --input-type=module - <<'NODE' ...writes /home/kpa/.factory/missions/dc664f26-9086-4d9b-896d-ba8f3bde8d71/evidence/consolidated-deployment/pvm-live/pvm-live-history.json with corrected decodeEventLog usage... NODE
commandsRun.observation: Decoded historical callback txs, read receiver state at their block heights, and decoded the canonical borrow QuoteTicketPublished/Borrowed evidence.

steps.action: Read RevmQuoteCallerProbe state and decode the probe-results stage1 echo tx.
steps.expected: Echo tx succeeded and lastEchoInput == lastEchoOutput == input.
steps.observed: Tx 0x282f32532f1bc337266e7a0d849edb1153449be7fad9d4b9feacec8aded641d0 succeeded; ProbeEchoed logged identical input/output 0x111122223333444455556666777788889999aaaabbbbccccddddeeeeffff0000; current lastEchoInput and lastEchoOutput match.

assertions.title: Quote probe returns deterministic risk output

steps.action: Read RevmQuoteCallerProbe state and decode the stage1 quote tx.
steps.expected: Stored quote result shows inputHash 0x7431463f..., resultHash 0x29ff247c..., borrowRate/maxLtv/liquidationThreshold = 700/7500/8500.
steps.observed: Tx 0x4f55eac1f75b6540e3d81d3618a8857574551809fce2b08bfc4e11a4b15b5698 succeeded; ProbeQuoted logged inputHash 0x7431463ff24a5f7497bdfc86b516ce3323be8e12d761f0ac39eab8171fd6170c and resultHash 0x29ff247cb200e3f80b21f04440957ce31334b5d3bab145708fb91a8dc8652352; live state shows 700/7500/8500.

assertions.title: PVM callback changes REVM receiver state

steps.action: Query historical CallbackReceived logs on RevmCallbackReceiver and read receiver state at the callbackFingerprint block height.
steps.expected: A PVM callback tx exists and receiver state is populated by callbackFingerprint without off-chain relay.
steps.observed: Historical tx 0x103e27e8fb8f28c075970d1507aa44382d6459e8e3e144d5387841481d5caeaf succeeded with txTo 0xc60E223A91aEbf1589A5509F308b4787cF6607AE; CallbackReceived logged caller 0xc60E223A91aEbf1589A5509F308b4787cF6607AE, callId 0xfe0f018034cfb577507b29d7c520caa12da31cf9c0be140fcdeeb20baeeeca09, resultHash 0x5eb43dca1f803a0b659da6925e9e8cc899b18b2618b46e30748f4f094e0c5b52, a=1, b=2; receiver state at block 6453644 matches exactly.

assertions.title: Roundtrip settlement stores PVM-derived state

steps.action: Decode the only settleBorrow tx recorded in probe results and read current settlement state.
steps.expected: settleBorrow stores principalDebt == 1070 with borrowRate 700 and matching quote hash.
steps.observed: Tx 0x4284ace5171ead5bea7c5795ee78528ac815b5d65d450b6f85de06b56ebe2ad5 succeeded, but RoundTripSettled logged debtDeltaApplied 1070 while principalDebt was already 2140; live settlement state is principalDebt 2140, lastBorrowRateBps 700, lastQuoteHash 0x29ff247cb200e3f80b21f04440957ce31334b5d3bab145708fb91a8dc8652352, settlementCount 4.

assertions.issues: The live settleBorrow proof does not satisfy the expected stored principalDebt invariant; the only on-chain settleBorrow event shows principalDebt 2140 rather than 1070.

assertions.title: All probe verdicts correct (A=true, B=true, C=true, D=false)

steps.action: Compare stored verdicts/finalSummary against the probe-results stage statuses and recomputed verdicts.
steps.expected: Stored verdicts are consistent with all four successful probe stages.
steps.observed: deployments/polkadot-hub-testnet-probe-results.json stores verdicts A=true/B=true/C=true/D=false and finalSummary 'Outcome B proven', but the same file records stage2=failed and stage3=failed; recomputation from stage statuses yields A=true, B=false, C=false, D=false.

assertions.issues: The collected proof results are internally inconsistent, so the verdict claim is not trustworthy as written.

steps.action: Read LendingCore.riskEngine(), RiskAdapter.quoteEngine(), and query revive.accountInfoOf for the quote engine address.
steps.expected: LendingCore points to RiskAdapter, which points to the probe quote engine, and revive.accountInfoOf returns a non-null PVM code hash.
steps.observed: LendingCore.riskEngine() = 0x67D0B226b5aE56A29E206840Ecd389670718Af66; RiskAdapter.quoteEngine() = 0x9a78F65b00E0AeD0830063eD0ea66a0B5d8876DE; revive.accountInfoOf(0x9a78...) returned codeHash 0xba8fe2a621062a30bba558a3846d0a18bfb2e9a09bfaed656b123e698b59af5b, matching the probe deployment manifest.

assertions.title: PVM quote engine serves product-path borrows

steps.action: Decode the canonical product-path borrow tx and read the stored quote ticket from RiskAdapter.
steps.expected: Borrow tx emits a quote ticket from LendingCore's RiskAdapter and the borrow uses that PVM-backed quote result.
steps.observed: Borrow tx 0x5a9edd08efd8aec5e1ccbe0295b97e03cebc1b75588acf19a2738a109deba532 succeeded; RiskAdapter 0x67D0... emitted QuoteTicketPublished with ticketId 0xd41d1400e56d93ca1c041750afae83af31fd015c85b3c297b361577fc922a928 and publisher 0x9faC289188229f40aBfaa4F8d720C14b8B448CF9; getQuoteTicket(ticketId) returns borrowRateBps 300 / maxLtvBps 7500 / liquidationThresholdBps 8500; the same tx emitted LendingCore Borrowed(..., borrowRateBps=300). The live risk path for that LendingCore resolves to quoteEngine 0x9a78... with PVM code hash 0xba8f....

assertions.title: Oracle price change cascades to risk engine

steps.action: Confirm a live oracle price-change tx exists and compare canonical RiskAdapter.quote outputs for healthy vs stressed collateral ratios.
steps.expected: If the assertion were true, the borrowRateBps returned by the PVM-backed risk path would differ after the collateral ratio worsens from an oracle price change.
steps.observed: The recorded oracle price-change tx 0x5c10a2e68c4a0f4086ca92d277afec29c328e255d22e644bd4ee8fa31fd165c7 succeeded, but live RiskAdapter.quote calls with utilization 5000 and fresh oracle return borrowRateBps 700 for both collateralRatioBps=20000 and collateralRatioBps=13000; only maxLtvBps changed 7500→6500 and liquidationThresholdBps changed 8500→7800.

assertions.issues: The live PVM-backed quote path does not change borrowRateBps when only the collateral ratio worsens; the assertion's claimed rate change is contradicted by on-chain quote results.

frictions.description: The probe results artifact is internally inconsistent: it stores verdicts/finalSummary claiming roundtrip success while its own stage2/stage3 statuses are failed.
frictions.resolution: Recomputed verdicts from stage statuses and used live receipts/logs instead of trusting the verdict object.

frictions.description: Current callback receiver state had been overwritten by a later callbackQuote run, so validating callbackFingerprint required historical log inspection plus historical eth_call state reads at the callback block height.
frictions.resolution: Queried CallbackReceived logs from block 0 and read RevmCallbackReceiver state at block 6453644 to recover the callbackFingerprint proof.

frictions.description: The first local borrow-log decoder used the wrong QuoteTicketPublished ABI shape and produced no decoded ticket data.
frictions.resolution: Inspected raw receipt logs, corrected the ABI to match IRiskAdapter, and reran the decoder to recover the published ticket and stored ticket values.

summary: Tested 8 assertions: 5 passed and 3 failed. Failed assertions: VAL-PVM-004, VAL-PVM-005, VAL-CROSS-006.
